problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
